summary: Completed frontend testing of RetailPro dashboard green theme redesign. All 10 requested features are working correctly - login functionality, dashboard loading, dark green sidebar, Update card with 40% revenue, Net Income with +35% trend, Total Return with -24% trend, stat cards, advertisement carousel, New Sale button, and date picker.

minor.issue: Returns 400 Bad Request (pre-existing issue from iteration_2)
subscriptionApi.getCurrent is not a function (pre-existing issue)

green_theme_redesign_results.login_functionality: PASS - admin@fmcg.com / Admin@2025 credentials work correctly
green_theme_redesign_results.dark_green_sidebar: PASS - Sidebar uses #1B4332 background color with all navigation items visible (Dashboard, New Sale, Orders, Customers, Products, Categories, Reports, Staff, Settings)
green_theme_redesign_results.update_card_40_percent: PASS - Update badge, 'Sales revenue increased', '40% in 1 week' text all visible with mini bar chart
green_theme_redesign_results.net_income_card_35_percent: PASS - Net Income card shows with +35% green trend badge and 'from last month' text
green_theme_redesign_results.total_return_card_24_percent: PASS - Total Return card shows $32,000.00 with -24% red trend badge and 'from last month' text
green_theme_redesign_results.stat_cards: PASS - Today's Sales, Orders Today, Customers, Products cards all display correctly with icons
green_theme_redesign_results.advertisement_carousel: PASS - Green-themed carousel with 'Refer & Earn $10' banner and CTA button visible
green_theme_redesign_results.new_sale_button_header: PASS - New Sale button visible in header area (green themed)
green_theme_redesign_results.date_picker_current_month: PASS - Date picker shows 'Feb 2026' in header

additional_observations.icon_component: Icons rendering correctly using new Lucide-based Icon component (replaced Ionicons)
additional_observations.sidebar_sections: All sections visible: SALES, CATALOG, INSIGHTS, SETTINGS, LINKED APPS, AVAILABLE APPS
additional_observations.referral_section: Refer & Earn and Affiliate Program cards properly themed in sidebar
additional_observations.charts: Sales by Payment donut chart, Top Products bar chart, and Sales Trend line chart all rendering
additional_observations.quick_actions: Quick Actions section in sidebar working (New Sale, Add Customer, Manage Products, Share & Earn)

critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing: /api/locations returns 400 - not related to green theme redesign
Pre-existing: subscriptionApi.getCurrent function missing - not related to redesign
Icon component migration from Ionicons to Lucide appears complete and functional
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Green theme redesign for RetailPro dashboard is complete and functional. Key features: dark green sidebar (#1B4332), Update card with 40% revenue metric, Net Income/Total Return cards with trend indicators, stat cards row, advertisement carousel, date picker. Icons successfully migrated from Ionicons to Lucide via custom Icon component at /app/frontend/src/components/Icon.tsx. WebSidebarLayout.tsx contains sidebar theme configuration. dashboard.tsx contains all the dashboard card components and webDashStyles.
